member.name: F:TokenNftInfo.AccountId
member.summary: The current owner of the NFT

member.name: F:TokenNftInfo.CreationTime
member.summary: The effective consensus timestamp at which the NFT was minted

member.name: F:TokenNftInfo.Metadata
member.summary: Represents the unique metadata of the NFT

member.name: F:TokenNftInfo.LedgerId
member.summary: The ledger ID the response was returned from; please see HIP-198 for the network-specific IDs.

member.name: F:TokenNftInfo.SpenderId
member.summary: If an allowance is granted for the NFT, its corresponding spender account

member.name: M:TokenNftInfo.#ctor(NftId,AccountId,DateTimeOffset,System.Byte[],LedgerId,AccountId)
member.param: the current owner of the nft
the ledger id of the response
the spender of the allowance (null if not an allowance)

member.name: M:TokenNftInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create token nft info from byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TokenNftInfo.FromProtobuf(Proto.TokenNftInfo)
member.summary: Create token nft info from a protobuf.
